adapter_input_contract: exact candidate input manifest and manifest digest
all projected candidate blob bytes and blob digests
exact qualification interface and test-vector digests
measured interpreter binary and committed dependency lock digests
execution_preconditions: adapter is content-addressed and explicitly bound to this test vector
adapter consumes the exact candidate manifest and every projected blob
interpreter binary and dependency lock identities are evidence-bound
baseline and mutated executions both produce schema-valid evidence

test_cases.expected_observation: return an empty ordered violation set only for the exactly governed tree
test_cases.stimulus: present an exact candidate tree whose changed paths have one PMORG-owned policy route and complete ledger evidence

test_cases.expected_observation: reject fail-closed and cite the exact changed path
test_cases.stimulus: add a changed path with no owner or more than one ownership route

test_cases.expected_observation: reject before accepting the tree and report the exact policy violation
test_cases.stimulus: mutate a trust-boundary or upstream-owned path without its required governance route

test_cases.expected_observation: reject the hybrid governance state with exact evidence and seam paths
test_cases.stimulus: change immutable predecessor evidence or introduce an unknown or successor-unbound seam

test_cases.expected_observation: at least one adapter observation or verdict changes
test_cases.stimulus: flip one byte in a projected candidate blob and rebuild its manifest
